original.role: sole EG mathematical and DAG authority

legacy_lean.role: kernel-checked implementation and parity evidence only

original_node_anchor_registry.role: exact diagram locator generated only from the pinned original

migration_workflow.first_step: extract and freeze the exact quantified node contract and original DAG edges
migration_workflow.second_step: consult the matching kernel-checked legacy NodeX.lean dependency cone as implementation and parity evidence
migration_workflow.discrepancy_policy: record an issue and block the affected node pending explicit source correction
